name: Tredir Sewpaul
headline: Computer Science Graduate | Software Engineering Enthusiast | Passionate about AI, Machine Learning, and Scalable Systems
location: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa

about.summary: I am a Computer Science graduate from the University of the Western Cape, passionate about software engineering, artificial intelligence, and scalable systems. My academic journey and practical experiences have strengthened my technical, analytical, and collaborative skills. I thrive in environments that merge creativity, technology, and teamwork — always seeking to build solutions that make a difference.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

education.institution: University of the Western Cape / Samsung South Africa / Microsoft SA
education.degree: Continuing Education – Samsung Future Innovation Lab

details.outcome: Delivered end-to-end digital solutions through industry-moderated projects

experience.title: AI Engineering Intern
experience.company: Department of Pharmacy, University of the Western Cape
responsibilities: Technical lead guiding architecture across supervised ML, LLM reasoning/summarisation, and vector search
Built document similarity models with evidence-linked outputs and human override paths
Implemented explainability, traceability, and governance-aligned controls
Ran Azure-based experimentation, ingestion, and model versioning environments
Led weekly technical reviews and aligned cross-team delivery

experience.title: Lead Physics Tutor
experience.company: University of the Western Cape / Belhar
responsibilities: Tutored first-year Physics (PHY151) students and supervised 20–30 learners per lab session.
Planned, prepared, and delivered lab sessions and experimental activities.
Graded and provided feedback on reports and exams.
Collaborated with other tutors for lesson planning and academic support.

experience.title: Website Developer
responsibilities: Developed and maintained the company’s informational website showcasing products and menus.
Created and managed product catalogues.
Handled social media updates and website functionality improvements.

experience.title: Website Administrator & Developer
responsibilities: Built and managed the company’s e-commerce website (www.cigarsemporium.com).
Handled IT-related tasks including hardware and software maintenance.
Created and maintained online catalogues for products.
Managed customer engagement, online sales, and social media interactions.

experience.title: Mathematics & English Tutor
responsibilities: Tutored Grade 6–11 students in Mathematics and English.
Developed personalized lesson plans and teaching materials.
Assessed student progress and adapted teaching methods to individual needs.

experience.title: Computer Science Volunteer
experience.company: UWC IT Society & Women in Tech
responsibilities: Visited high schools across Cape Town to promote STEM careers.
Delivered presentations on Computer Science and tertiary education.
Organized hands-on activities to engage students in technology learning.

projects.name: Neural Networks Implementation
projects.description: Developed a machine learning project focused on implementing neural networks with forward propagation, cost function, and backpropagation. Explored optimization, classification, and hyperparameter tuning.

activities.name: Standard Bank Hackathon (UniHack)
activities.description: Collaborated in a 5-member team to develop and prototype a transport industry solution focused on community-driven innovation.

activities.name: SANReN Cyber Security Challenge (CSC)
activities.description: Participated in challenges involving Capture the Flag, Penetration Testing, Forensics, Cryptography, and Malware Analysis. Collaborated with teammates to defend systems against simulated cyberattacks.

personal_traits: Strong interest in AI and emerging technologies
Lifelong learner with continuous growth mindset
